title: BEM-865 validate processor inputs
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
script = Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py')
status_parts = []
try:
    data = json.loads(queue.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue.exists() else None
    status_parts.append('QUEUE_JSON_OK')
except Exception as exc:
    data = None
    status_parts.append('QUEUE_JSON_BAD_' + exc.__class__.__name__)
script_text = script.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if script.exists() else ''
checks = {
    'script_exists': script.exists(),
    'has_main': 'def main()' in script_text,
    'has_gh_workflow': 'gh workflow run' in script_text,
    'has_commit_state': 'def commit_state()' in script_text,
    'has_workflow_key': isinstance(data, dict) and bool(data.get('workflow')),
    'has_inputs': isinstance(data, dict) and isinstance(data.get('inputs'), dict),
}
status = 'VALID' if all(checks.values()) and 'QUEUE_JSON_OK' in status_parts else 'INVALID'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_PROCESSOR_INPUTS_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-865 processor inputs validation\nStatus: ' + status + '\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + k + ': ' + str(v) for k,v in checks.items()) + '\nParts: ' + ', '.join(status_parts) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('processor inputs validation: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
